steps.title: Check the required verb form
steps.content: The phrase "is required" needs an infinitive verb after it: someone is required to do something. The blank must complete that standard construction before the object "other Interpol countries."

steps.title: Eliminate bad verb forms
steps.content: A uses a past participle, C uses a participle, and D uses a finite present-tense verb. None can correctly follow "is required" in this sentence. The answer is B.
